title: LS25 3DL, Ridge Road Energy Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/EP3131AV/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter for:   Operator name: Ridge Road Energy Limited Installation name: Ridge Road Farm Anaerobic Digestion Facility Permit number: EPR/EP3131AV/S004  "
